questions.question: The area drained by a river and its tributaries is called:
questions.explanation: A drainage basin refers to the entire region drained by a river and its tributaries.

questions.question: Which river system forms the world's largest delta?
questions.explanation: The Ganga and Brahmaputra rivers together form the Sundarban delta, the largest in the world.

questions.question: The Indus river flows through which region of India?
questions.explanation: The Indus flows through Ladakh in India before entering Pakistan.

questions.question: Which tributary joins the Ganga at Prayagraj?
questions.explanation: The Yamuna joins the Ganga at Prayagraj.

questions.question: Which river forms Majuli, one of the largest river islands in the world?
questions.explanation: Majuli island is formed in the Brahmaputra river in Assam.

questions.question: Which feature is commonly found in the middle course of a river?
questions.explanation: Meanders develop in the middle and lower course of a river where the slope becomes gentle.

questions.question: Which of the following rivers forms the Dhuadhar Falls?
questions.explanation: The Narmada river forms the Dhuadhar Falls near Jabalpur.

questions.question: Which peninsular river originates near Mahabaleshwar?
questions.explanation: The Krishna river originates near Mahabaleshwar in Maharashtra.

questions.question: Which river basin is the largest in Peninsular India?
questions.explanation: The Godavari basin is the largest river basin in Peninsular India.

questions.question: Which river flows through a rift valley?
questions.explanation: The Narmada river flows through a rift valley.

questions.question: Which of the following lakes is a lagoon?
questions.explanation: Chilika Lake in Odisha is a lagoon separated from the sea by sand bars.

questions.question: Which lake is located in Jammu and Kashmir?
questions.explanation: Dal Lake is a famous lake located in Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir.

questions.question: Which of the following is a saltwater lake?
questions.explanation: Sambhar Lake in Rajasthan is the largest saltwater lake in India.

questions.question: Which activity depends heavily on river water?
questions.explanation: Agriculture depends on irrigation which requires river water.

questions.question: Which factor mainly causes floods in the Brahmaputra valley?
questions.explanation: Heavy rainfall and large sediment loads cause frequent floods in the Brahmaputra valley.

questions.question: Which of the following rivers flows eastwards into the Bay of Bengal?
questions.explanation: Godavari flows eastwards and drains into the Bay of Bengal.

questions.question: Which river forms the Sundarban delta along with the Ganga?
questions.explanation: The Ganga and Brahmaputra together form the Sundarban delta.

questions.question: Which of the following rivers is known for forming braided channels?
questions.explanation: The Brahmaputra forms braided channels due to heavy sediment deposition.

questions.question: Which river basin is famous for the Marble Rocks near Jabalpur?
questions.explanation: The Marble Rocks are located along the Narmada river near Jabalpur.

questions.question: Which of the following is an artificial lake?
questions.explanation: Govind Sagar Lake is a reservoir formed by the Bhakra dam.

questions.question: Which sector benefits from hydroelectric power generated by rivers?
questions.explanation: Hydroelectric power from rivers is used to generate electricity.

questions.question: Which of the following contributes most to river pollution?
questions.explanation: Industrial waste is a major contributor to river pollution.

questions.question: Which programme aims to clean the Ganga river?
questions.explanation: The Ganga Action Plan was launched to reduce pollution in the Ganga.

questions.question: Which feature results from river deposition near its mouth?
questions.explanation: A delta forms due to deposition of sediments near the river mouth.

questions.question: Why is river conservation important?

options.C: To maintain water quality and ecosystems

questions.explanation: River conservation helps maintain clean water and protect ecosystems.
